title: Lesson: Defesa Multiway do Big Blind Pre-Flop
plan: Read PDF 'classes/RegLife-DEFESAMULTIWAYDOBIGBLINDPRE-FLOP (1).pdf' to extract multiway BB defense ranges, hand categories, and decision criteria
Define multiway-appropriate hand tiers/constants (suited connectors, pairs, suited broadways, etc.) based on PDF content in lesson_classifier.py
Implement _eval_multiway_bb() method in LessonClassifier following the _eval_rfi() pattern - evaluate hand playability in multiway spots
Update existing detection block (sort_order 8, ~line 188-192) to call _eval_multiway_bb() instead of returning None
Also handle the fold case: detect when hero folds a strong multiway hand in BB (incorrect fold)

Add comprehensive tests in test_lesson_classifier.py covering: correct defense (suited connectors, pairs), incorrect defense (dominated hands), incorrect fold (strong hands), marginal cases, missing card info
Run quality gates: pytest, lint, typecheck
